nasb.text: Their webs will not become clothing, Nor will they cover themselves with their works; Their works are works of iniquity, And an act of violence is in their hands.

esv.text: Their webs will not serve as clothing; men will not cover themselves with what they make. Their works are works of iniquity, and deeds of violence are in their hands.

cnv.text: 他們的網，不能作衣服， 他們所作的，也不能遮蓋自己； 他們所作的是罪孽的作為， 他們的手裡滿是強暴的行為。

ccb.text: 这网不能做衣服遮盖你们。 你们行为邪恶， 做事残暴。

csbs.text: 他们的网不能作为衣服， 他们所做的也不能遮盖自己； 他们的作为是邪恶的作为， 他们手中都是残暴的行为；
